# Twilight of the Idols

*[Nietzsche](../philosophers/nietzsche.md) · 1889*

A short reckoning, subtitled "How to Philosophize with a Hammer", it condenses into cutting formulas the critique of morality, metaphysics, and decadence. Nietzsche recounts in it "how the true world finally became a fable".
